turns.transcript: Can you hear me okay over this background noise?
turns.speaker: primary

turns.transcript: Good. I'm at the airport, so it's a little loud here.
turns.speaker: primary

turns.transcript: I need to change my flight to the morning departure if there's anything available.
turns.speaker: primary

turns.transcript: Window seat if you can, aisle is fine too.
turns.speaker: primary

turns.transcript: Perfect, go ahead and book that one. Thank you.
turns.speaker: primary

notes: Single-speaker turns with noise on the speech only, clean gaps, 2.5s gaps.
